case_title: NIJMEH HUSSEIN VS. LINDA WALLACE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LINDA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN, NIJMEH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLACE, LINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4622 3RD ST. S.F. CA. 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $60.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN, NIJMEH
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LINDA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN, NIJMEH AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LINDA DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN, NIJMEH SERVED DEC-16-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LINDA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WALLACE, LINDA
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSSEIN, NIJMEH
